a.xlink:title: GTK Bit Analysis tab for reverse-engineering classic CAN payloads.
GTK GUI widget registry and the application's GUI/thread API.
GTK-independent engine for CAN payload bit analysis.
Hardware-independent CAN/CAN FD message and statistics data types.
Global application state shared across the GUI and worker threads.
Minimal CAN database (DBC) model, parser, and signal decoder.
Generic CAN driver abstraction (vtable) and thin wrapper API.
